questions.question: A shipping company has $12x + 18$ crates to transport. What is the greatest common factor of this expression?
The traffic flow on a highway is modeled by the expression $20x^2 + 30x$. What is the factored form of this expression?
A delivery truck travels $8x + 12$ miles per hour. What is the greatest common factor of this expression?
The cost of shipping a package is modeled by the expression $15x + 25$. What is the factored form of this expression?
A logistics company has $24x + 36$ containers to transport. What is the greatest common factor of this expression?
The time it takes for a package to be delivered is modeled by the expression $9x + 12$. What is the factored form of this expression?
A transportation company has $16x + 20$ vehicles to maintain. What is the greatest common factor of this expression?
The volume of cargo that can be transported by a ship is modeled by the expression $12x^2 + 15x$. What is the factored form of this expression?
A logistics company has $25x + 30$ crates to transport. Factor out the greatest common factor and simplify the expression. Show your work.
The cost of shipping a package is modeled by the expression $18x + 24$. Factor out the greatest common factor and simplify the expression. Show your work and explain your reasoning.

teacher_rules: Read each question carefully before answering.
Show all work and explain your reasoning for free-response questions.
Use the factoring method to simplify expressions whenever possible.
